summary: Milestone-based multi-agent research workflow skill with convergence gate.

install.claude_code: Packaged install copies this skill into the target Claude Code skills root. Installed copies do not auto-follow repo updates; reinstall or rerun install with --force to refresh. For live repo-tracking development installs, use packages/skills-market/scripts/install_symlink_claude_code.sh against the monorepo skills root; that helper symlinks all market-listed skill-pack entries into the target Claude Code skills root, not only research-team.
